Misc summon Anima, Anima pop Allos to search Haba
Un deck de Guerreros para el formato Semigoat.
Un deck de Guerreros con Neos, para el formato semigoat.

Man, GMX has some real slot machine combo routing, but the biggest problem is Noma. Her on field effect is absolutely insane, especially since she can summon a 4-5 dino COMPREX with ease, but pure GMX genuinely has no way to summon her with any consistency. The only answer I could come up with was sending her to grave with Mitsurugi Ritual, then reviving her off whatever loose revive is left. So you've got ALLOS, Kimridge stack > VELOX, Cross Sheep, Charmer Quartet, and Selandea to somehow get her onto the field.

GMX bridges into Mitsurugi with Archosaur (pop ALLOS/VELOX), and Mitsurugi bridges into GMX with Zombie Vampire. 12 GMX-sided starters, 4 Mitsurugi-sided ones, so consistency's actually ok, but sadly there's only enough space for 12 non-engine. Could maybe argue for cutting the GMX Trap, quickplay, or both - the routing frequently won't let you search either of them.

deck_excerpt: Blair Flannigan's what if the writers went with their original deck idea updated.
deck_description:
Love From Afar - Blair Flannigan's what if the writers went with their original deck idea updated.

In a recent interview with the duel writer for Yu-Gi-Oh! GX it was revieled that Blairs original main monster would be The Unhappy Girl but they decided to create an original monster in Maiden in Love to symbolise a girl in love. Interestingly, The Unhappy Girl and Maiden in Love have the exact same stats.

Let me know if you've got any ideas to improve it.
Power patron for stabbing, DoomZ for control.

deck_excerpt: Trying to make Spright Twins work in 2026
deck_description: Live Twins and Spright make for a very consistent Rank and Link 2 spam deck. The new Live Twin support from last year's Alliance Insight (namely Ki-Sikil Deal and Lil-La Sweet) helped the deck out a bit, but it still has a bunch of difficulties trying to compete with newer decks. It makes for a very fun casual deck though.
